channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Vampire Survivors Unveils Switch 2 Version and DLC
item.description: Vampire Survivors announces a new Switch 2 version and DLC, alongside the 'Wet Update'. The game continues to evolve with fresh content.

item.title: Wyoming Sheriff Unveils Clint Eastwood Cruiser Design
item.description: Laramie County Sheriff Brian Kozak reveals a new cruiser design inspired by Clint Eastwood's 'High Plains Drifter'. The unique look has garnered positive feedback.

item.title: Monster Hunter Wilds Confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: Monster Hunter Wilds is officially coming to Nintendo Switch 2, confirming long-standing rumors. Fans can expect exciting gameplay on the new platform.

item.title: Microsoft's New AI Models: A Critical Review
item.description: After testing Microsoft's new AI models, doubts arise about their readiness for mainstream use. The models were showcased at Build 2026.

item.title: Windows 11 Tools from Build 2026: Key Highlights
item.description: Build 2026 introduces four new tools for Windows 11, enhancing developer experience. These tools aim to streamline development processes.

item.title: Top Trailers from Summer Game Fest 2026
item.description: The Summer Game Fest 2026 showcased exciting new trailers, highlighting upcoming games. Gizmodo lists their favorite reveals from the event.

item.title: Resident Evil Veronica: No First-Person View
item.description: CAPCOM insider confirms Resident Evil Veronica won't feature a first-person perspective, but warns of significant changes from the original.

item.title: Yooka-Laylee Returns as Kart Racer
item.description: Yooka-Laylee is back in a new SNES-style kart racer, with multiplayer beta tests planned before launch. The game promises nostalgic fun.

item.title: Intel Arc G3 Chip Performance Benchmarks Released
item.description: Intel reveals performance benchmarks for its Arc G3 Extreme chip, promising significant improvements for gaming handhelds. The chip offers double the battery life at similar performance levels.

item.title: AMD's Future Plans for Zen Architectures
item.description: AMD announces new Zen architectures and products for the AM5 platform through 2029, with future socket plans contingent on DDR6 and PCIe advancements.

item.title: Palworld Launches July 10
item.description: Open-world survival game Palworld will officially launch on July 10 for multiple platforms, leaving Early Access behind. Excitement builds for its full release.

item.title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush Announced
item.description: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is set to launch on multiple platforms, including PS5 and Xbox Series, on September 24. The game promises thrilling racing experiences.

item.title: Stranger Than Heaven Features Digital Tupac
item.description: Stranger Than Heaven will feature a digital resurrection of Tupac Shakur, adding a unique twist to the game. The announcement has sparked mixed reactions.

item.title: Demand for Destiny 3 Surges at Summer Game Fest
item.description: Fans at Summer Game Fest are vocally demanding Destiny 3, showcasing their passion for the franchise. The hashtag #WeWantDestiny3 trended during the event.
